message:
feat(archive): full commit browsing, file tree, and diff rendering for web UI

Expand the archive web UI from minimal stubs to a complete git-based
browsing experience:

mail_ui.rs:
- Replace stub archive routes with full implementations supporting
  project-scoped archive browsing, commit history pagination, file tree
  navigation, and diff rendering
- Add query parameter parsing for pagination (page, per_page) and
  filtering (path, since, until)
- Wire up storage::ensure_archive and ensure_archive_root for on-demand
  archive initialization from the web UI
- Route dispatch now passes query string to archive routes

storage/lib.rs (archive web UI helpers):
- ExtendedCommitInfo struct with diff stats and relative dates
- relative_date_from_secs for human-readable timestamps ("2 days ago",
  "Feb 08, 2026")
- File tree construction from git tree objects with nested directory support
- Commit detail rendering with full diff stat summaries
- Pagination helpers for commit log traversal
- File content retrieval at arbitrary commit SHAs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
